modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to confirm attendance for the upcoming school year.

full_description_text: The user was trying to confirm their attendance for the next school year but ran into issues. They only got a message saying there are no pending items for them, which seems like a placeholder. Also, when they tried to register for classes, they got an error saying the page isn’t working and something about an invalid response.
short_description: Unable to confirm attendance for the upcoming school year.
description: The user was trying to confirm their attendance for the next school year but ran into issues. They only got a message saying there are no pending items for them, which seems like a placeholder. Also, when they tried to register for classes, they got an error saying the page isn’t working and something about an invalid response.
